name: claude-code-setup-optimizer
description: Optimiza tu forma de trabajar con Claude Code: referencia y organiza metodología (Forja, design-review, grill, handoff) + automatizaciones (hooks, subagents, /release, plantillas de permisos) + la skill optimize-my-setup que recomienda y deja al usuario elegir qué aplicar. Referencia los repos originales (auto-actualizan) y credita a sus autores. Instalable en cualquier repo.

plugins.name: forge-methodology
plugins.description: Human↔AI methodology: align intent → versioned spec → adversarial grill ×3 → global plan → optimised execution → verify vs DoD → owner sign-off. Domain-agnostic.

plugins.name: design-review
plugins.description: Integral design/redesign/audit: visual hierarchy, IA, cognitive load, accessibility, tokens, motion.

plugins.name: working-methods
plugins.description: Cross-project working norms: /grill (adversarial ×3) + /handoff (session relay) + forge-on-claude. Model routing and orchestration baked in. (For low-cost comms, pair with the original caveman plugin — JuliusBrussee/caveman.)

plugins.name: automations
plugins.description: La skill optimize-my-setup optimiza TODA la config .claude de un repo a su medida (CLAUDE.md, settings.json permisos/hooks/env, skills, agents generados por invariante, workflows, .mcp.json, output-styles), reutilizando los plugins del usuario. Incluye hook guard-append-only, /release, y templates (permisos, rules CLAUDE.md, reviewers). El usuario elige qué aplicar. Language-agnostic.
